title: Connection error to Amazing Marvin API
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Amazing Marvin API, the error 'getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND api.amazingmarvin.com' is returned, indicating that the host cannot be found.
root_cause: The error occurs because the specified base URL 'api.amazingmarvin.com' is incorrect. The correct base URL should be 'https://serv.amazingmarvin.com/api/:endpoint', which leads to the ENOTFOUND error when the incorrect URL is used.
fix_steps: Change the API base URL to 'https://serv.amazingmarvin.com/api/:endpoint'
Replace ':endpoint' with the actual endpoint you want to call
Test the connection using a valid endpoint like '/test'
agent_instruction: Update the Amazing Marvin API base URL in your configuration to 'https://serv.amazingmarvin.com/api/:endpoint'.
